title: Help George Round Table 30 support families devastated by tragedy
description: GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - In the wake of the...
bodyText:
Video

GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - In the wake of the Victoria Street building disaster, George Round Table 30 is stepping up to aid the families of victims.

Chairman Stefan du Plessis says many of the families and survivors are facing unimaginable hardship - loss of loved ones, and for some, the inability to work again - and will need help going forward.

"Our mission is urgent: We're collaborating with Food Socks to provide food and essential hampers, offering these at cost, so all proceeds go directly to those who need it.


> What your donation means:


- R600/month = food for a family for one month
- R3 000 total = food and essential items for one family for 3 months

Our goal: Raise R400 000 to support as many families as possible

Donate any amount:George 30 Round TableBank: FNBAccount: 52295232360Ref: Name + SUPPORT


> VIDEO - George Round Table 30 member Johan Lochner appeals for help for the families from the disaster site:


Your browser does not support HTML5 video.


> To further assist contact Stefan de Plessis 066 055 1010, Wentzel Stewart 083 455 4425 or Johan Lochner 083 986 2004.


"Every act of kindness matters. Let's show these families they're not alone. Thank you for your compassion," says Du Plessis.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
